events.desc_en: Hosted by London Cantonese Opera Culture Association, this grand Cantonese opera concert gathers celebrated opera artists from Hong Kong, Macau and Foshan. The show features classic Cantonese arias and full selected excerpts from the iconic opera The Romance of Purple Hairpin, showcasing authentic Lingnan opera culture. Performance starts at 12 noon on Sunday 6 September 2026 at Shaw Theatre.
events.desc_zh: 倫敦粵韻曲藝文化協會呈獻《粵韻悠揚之紫釵傾情》粵劇演唱會，匯集港澳佛山資深粵劇名伶，上演多首經典粵曲及全套《紫釵記》精選折子戲，推廣嶺南傳統戲曲文化。2026 年 9 月 6 日中午 12 時於 Shaw Theatre 開演。
events.body_en:
London Cantonese Opera Culture Association proudly presents Melodious Cantonese Opera: The Romance of Purple Hairpin, a cultural event to promote traditional Chinese Cantonese opera art.
This grand Cantonese opera concert gathers top-tier opera performers from Hong Kong, Macau, Foshan and London. The performance features classic Cantonese opera excerpts, including well-loved standalone aria scenes and full segments from the iconic masterpiece The Romance of Purple Hairpin.
The event will be held on Sunday 6th September 2026, starting at 12:00 noon at Shaw Theatre in central London. Audiences can enjoy authentic Cantonese opera singing, elaborate traditional costumes and exquisite stage performances, immersing themselves in the timeless charm of Lingnan opera culture.
events.body_zh:
倫敦粵韻曲藝文化協會主辦《粵韻悠揚之紫釵傾情》推廣中國文化粵劇演唱會。
本次大型粵劇匯演雲集香港、澳門、佛山及倫敦各地一線粵劇名伶，演出多首經典粵曲彩唱選段，以及粵劇經典名著《紫釵記》全套精選折子戲。
活動將於 2026 年 9 月 6 日（星期日）中午 12 時正，倫敦市中心 Shaw Theatre 隆重上演。觀眾可欣賞正宗粵曲唱腔、華麗傳統戲服與細緻舞台演繹，感受嶺南戲曲綿延千年的獨特韻味。

people.bio_en: Member of the Chinese Theatre Literature Society, member of the CPPCC of Lianjiang City (Zhanjiang), Guangdong Province, and member of the Election Committee of Sha Tin District Council, Hong Kong. Graduated in 1987 from Guangdong Zhanjiang Art School, majoring in Cantonese opera (specialising in Hua Dan / female roles). In 2003, she migrated to Hong Kong under the Quality Migrant Scheme. She initially taught Cantonese opera and Chinese literature at three primary and secondary schools under Hong Kong's Yan Chai Hospital. In 2015, she completed an advanced literature course at the Shanghai Theatre Academy, and in 2016 graduated from the Central Conservatory of Music's arts management programme. She currently serves as Artistic Director of Wah Kong Group Music Co. Ltd., playwright, and director. She is also the principal Hua Dan of the company's Dragon Boat Phoenix Opera Troupe and Yao Qun Sheng Cantonese Opera Troupe. She remains active on the Cantonese opera stage with numerous works. Her early Wang Wudan Cantonese Songs Karaoke Album is well-known domestically and internationally. She has performed and directed over a hundred plays, including Golden Leaf Chrysanthemum, The Princess's Flower, The Peony Pavilion, etc. Her playwright works have received national and provincial awards.
people.bio_zh: 中國戲劇文學學會會員，中國廣東省廉江市（湛江）政協委員，香港沙田區議會選委會委員。1987年畢業於廣東湛江藝術學校粵劇專業，專攻花旦。2003年以優才身份移居香港，初期服務於香港仁濟醫院旗下三間中小學教授粵劇知識與中國文學。2015年結業於上海戲劇學院文學高級班，2016年畢業於中央音樂學院藝術管理課程。現任職華港群樂有限公司藝術總監，編劇、導演，也是公司旗下《龍舟鳳鳴劇團》《耀群聲粵劇團》正印花旦。主演及編導作品眾多，早年的《王戊丹粵曲卡拉OK專輯》享譽海內外。其主要劇目及編劇作品包括《金葉菊》《帝女花》《牡丹亭》《紫釵記》《古韻秋聲》《落花如雪》等多部，多次獲國家及省市獎項。

people.role_en: Performing Artist | Mun Mo Sang (civil-military lead)
people.bio_en: National First-Grade Actress, Artistic Director of Foshan Cantonese Opera Institute, Inheritor of Foshan's Intangible Cultural Heritage (Cantonese Opera) project, Vice Chairman of Foshan Cantonese Opera Artists Association, Cultural Talent of Foshan City. Graduated from Guangdong Cantonese Opera School and studied under the renowned master Luo Jiabao. Winner of multiple gold medals in Guangdong Youth Performing Arts Competitions and the "Top Ten Stage New Talents" title. Major roles include The Thirteenth Lang of the South Sea, Iron Army, General's Order, 72 Tenants, Mirror Sea Soul, Blood Stained Black Gauze, etc. She has performed in the US, UK, Australia, Malaysia, Singapore, Hong Kong, Macau, and other places, earning high praise from overseas audiences.
people.bio_zh: 國家一級演員，佛山粵劇傳習所藝術主任，佛山市非物質文化遺產項目（粵劇）傳承人，佛山市粵劇家協會副主席，佛山市文化英才。畢業於廣東粵劇學校，師承著名粵劇表演藝術大師羅家寶先生。曾獲多屆廣東省青年演藝大賽金獎及「十佳舞臺新秀」稱號。主演劇目包括《南海十三郎》《鐵軍》《將軍令》《七十二家房客》《鏡海魂》《血濺烏紗》《夢斷香銷四十年》等。曾多次赴美國、英國、澳洲、馬來西亞、新加坡、香港、澳門等地演出，深受海外觀眾好評。

people.role_en: Performing Artist | Mun Mo Sang (civil-military lead)
people.bio_en: Macau Cantonese Opera performer, renowned Wen Wu Sheng (civil-military male role) in Macau. Current Vice Chairman of Guangdong Province Quyi Artists Association and Special Advisor for the Macau Region of the Guangdong Cantonese Opera Compendium. He first performed on stage at age 7 and entered Foshan Cantonese Opera School at age 11. After moving to Macau, he has dedicated himself to the inheritance of Cantonese opera. In 2019 and 2024, he played leading male roles in large-scale productions with troupes from Foshan and Zhuhai. His playwright works Iron Blooded Heart and Ode to Quyi won awards at the China Quyi Peony Awards National Competition.
people.bio_zh: 澳門粵劇表演藝術家，澳門著名粵劇文武生，現任廣東省曲藝家協會副主席，廣東省粵劇大典澳門區特約顧問。其七歲登上佛山市大戲院唱唱劇主題曲，十一歲被挑選進入佛山地區粵劇學校。移居澳門一直從事粵劇承傳工作，先後在2019年和2024年分別在與佛山、珠海兩地劇團合演大型粵劇中擔任男主角。其編劇的粵曲《鐵血丹心》《曲藝頌》在第十二、十三屆中國曲藝最高獎項牡丹獎全國曲藝大賽中先後獲文學獎和節目獎。

people.role_zh: 粵劇演員 | 統籌策劃
people.bio_en: Loved Cantonese arts since childhood. Studied under Wang Wudan and Zheng Ning in Guangzhou. In the UK, studied theory, erhu, and yangqin under Leung Shu-wing. In 2024, she founded the Yue Yun Quyi Cultural Association to promote the inheritance of Cantonese opera.
people.bio_zh: 自幼熱愛粵曲藝術，對傳統戲曲懷有深厚情感。啟蒙於王戈丹師傅，後來有幸赴廣州得到鄭寧師傅的指導唱功，進一步提升唱藝技巧；回到英國後，亦有幸從路樹榮老師、系統研習粵曲音樂理論、練唱二胡和揚琴，拓展粵劇藝術視野與理解。多年來，專注鑽研及演繹傳統粵劇折子戲與經典唱段，並積極參與各類粵曲演出與文化推廣活動，曾多次應邀參加倫敦昇平樂苑主辦之粵曲演唱會。2024年創立「粵韻曲藝文化協會」，以推動粵劇薪火相傳為己任。此後，我不斷向兩位師傅請教，努力提升粵曲水平。

learn.title_en: Tracing the Roots: 200 Years of a Lingnan Treasure
learn.title_zh: 粵劇溯源：二百年的嶺南瑰寶
learn.summary_en: Cantonese opera is one of Guangdong's most representative regional theatre traditions.....
learn.summary_zh: 粵劇是廣東省最具代表性的地方戲曲之一，根源可追溯至明代，歷經數百年的演變....
learn.body_en:
Cantonese opera is one of Guangdong's most representative regional theatre traditions. Its roots reach back to the Ming dynasty, but it was over the past two centuries that it took the distinctive shape we recognise today. Along the way it absorbed several vocal traditions — Naam Yam, Han opera and Kunqu among them — together with the folk music of the Lingnan region, producing its lyrical melodic style and its finely expressive performance.
Cantonese opera has always been more than entertainment. It is a portrait of Lingnan culture in miniature, carrying the language, history and feeling of the Cantonese people. Every line of verse and every movement holds generations of an artist's craft — which is why it still passes from one generation to the next in Chinese communities around the world.
learn.body_zh:
粵劇是廣東省最具代表性的地方戲曲之一，根源可追溯至明代，歷經數百年的演變，在近二百多年間逐漸成形為我們今天所認識的獨特劇種。它在發展過程中融合了南音、漢劇、崑曲等多種聲腔，並吸收嶺南民間音樂的養分，孕育出婉轉悠揚的唱腔與細膩傳神的表演風格。
粵劇從不只是娛樂，更是嶺南文化的縮影，承載著廣東人的語言、歷史與情感。每一段唱詞、每一個身段，都凝聚著世代藝人的心血與智慧。正因如此，它能夠跨越時代，至今仍在世界各地的華人社群中代代相傳。

learn.title_en: The Many Faces of the Dan: Female Roles in Cantonese Opera
learn.title_zh: 旦角的萬種風情：粵劇女角面面觀
learn.summary_en: Among all the role types, the dan is the most finely varied — each kind matched to a different temperament and station….
learn.summary_zh:
在粵劇眾多行當之中，「旦」角的類型最為細緻多變，每一種都對應著不同的性格與身份。
「小旦」多飾演清純可人的少女….
learn.body_en:
Among all the role types, the dan is the most finely varied — each kind matched to a different temperament and station.
The siu daan tends to play the pure, endearing young woman, shy in manner and gentle in voice. The faa daan is stately and glamorous, often the leading lady, poised and gracious. The dou maa daan is bold and fierce, equally at home with civil and martial skill, and the most demanding test of a performer's physical command. Each kind of dan differs not only in costume and make-up but in stagecraft, gaze and vocal line. It is this delicacy of division that gives the women of the Cantonese stage such depth — and lets the audience read a character's inner world in a single glance or smile.
learn.body_zh:
在粵劇眾多行當之中，「旦」角的類型最為細緻多變，每一種都對應著不同的性格與身份。
「小旦」多飾演清純可人的少女，舉止嬌羞、唱腔柔美；「花旦」則雍容華貴，常為戲中的女主角，氣質端莊大方；「刀馬旦」剛烈果敢，能文能武，最考驗演員的身手與功架。不同的旦角，不僅服飾妝容各異，連走位、眼神與唱腔都有講究。正是這份細膩的分工，讓粵劇舞台上的女性形象豐富而立體，也讓觀眾在一顰一笑之間，讀懂角色的內心世界。

learn.title_en: Sheng, Dan, Jing, Chou: An Introduction to Role Types
learn.summary_en: The characters in Cantonese opera are sorted into role categories — hong dong — according to gender, temperament, age and station….
learn.body_en:
The characters in Cantonese opera are sorted into role categories — hong dong — according to gender, temperament, age and station. They fall into four main types: sheng, dan, jing and chou.
The sheng are male roles, from the refined scholar (man sang) to the martial hero (mou sang). The dan are female roles, the richest category of all, ranging from the innocent young maiden to the stately, glamorous lead. The jing, or "big painted face", wears a bold mask and often plays a fierce loyal minister or a villain. The chou is the comic role, sharpening the drama with witty words and antics. Learning the role types is the first step to enjoying Cantonese opera — because each one is a vivid little world of its own.
learn.body_zh:
粵劇演員所扮演的角色，依性別、性格、年齡與身份的不同，劃分為多種「行當」，主要可歸納為「生、旦、淨、丑」四大類。
「生」為男角，有文質彬彬的文生，也有武藝高強的武生；「旦」為女角，類型最為豐富，由清純的小旦到雍容的花旦不一而足；「淨」即「大花臉」，臉譜鮮明，多扮演性格剛烈的忠臣或反派；「丑」則是插科打諢的角色，以詼諧的言行為戲劇增添張力與趣味。認識行當，是欣賞粵劇的第一步——因為每一個行當，都自成一個鮮明的舞台世界。

learn.title_en: Sing, Act, Recite, Combat: The Four Pillars of Performance
learn.title_zh: 唱、做、唸、打：粵劇的四大表演功架
learn.summary_en: The art of Cantonese opera rests on four elements working as one: sing (cheung), act (jou), recite (nim) and combat (daa). Singing is the vocal art….
learn.body_en:
The art of Cantonese opera rests on four elements working as one: sing (cheung), act (jou), recite (nim) and combat (daa). Singing is the vocal art, prized for the flavour of its melodic lines and the feeling it carries. Acting covers posture and hand gestures, every movement following its own grammar. Reciting includes spoken dialogue and rhythmic, chanted delivery. Combat is the martial work and physical skill that displays a performer's poise and power.
Beyond these four, the artistry of the water sleeves and subtle body movements adds symbolic meaning and grace. A fine performer often trains for decades before these skills fuse into one — until they can give and hold back at will on stage, uniting form and spirit.
learn.body_zh:
粵劇的表演藝術，向來講求「唱、做、唸、打」四大元素的融會貫通。「唱」是唱腔，講求行腔的韻味與情感；「做」是身段與做手，舉手投足皆有章法；「唸」是唸白，包括對白與富節奏感的念誦；「打」則是武打與身手，展現演員的功架與氣勢。
四者之外，水袖功夫與細膩的身段動作，更為表演增添了象徵意味與美感。一名出色的演員，往往需要數十年的磨練，才能將這四項功夫融為一體，在舞台上做到收放自如、形神兼備。

about.en: Carrying Cantonese opera to a London stage
Yuet Wan London is a non-profit cultural association dedicated to preserving and sharing the living art of Cantonese opera and music in the United Kingdom.
about.zh: 倫敦粵韻曲藝文化協會是一個非牟利文化團體，致力在英國保存及傳承粵劇與粵樂這門活的藝術。

about.en: “To convey feeling through art, and to cultivate people through culture.”

Cantonese opera — 粵劇 — is a UNESCO-recognised art form that weaves together song, music, movement and storytelling refined over centuries in the Lingnan region of southern China.

Through performances, workshops and community events, we bring artists and audiences together — supporting practitioners in the UK while introducing new audiences to its beauty.
about.zh:
粵劇是聯合國教科文組織認定的藝術形式，融合唱、做、唸、打，於嶺南地區歷經數百年淬煉而成。

透過演出、工作坊與社區活動，我們連繫藝術家與觀眾 —— 既支持在英的從業者，亦向新觀眾介紹粵劇之美。

about.en: Performances
Staging full Cantonese opera productions and music evenings with live ensemble accompaniment.
about.zh: 舉辦完整的粵劇演出及粵樂晚會，並以現場樂隊伴奏。

about.en: Workshops & classes
Hands-on sessions in singing, movement and percussion for newcomers and enthusiasts of all ages.
about.zh: 為各年齡層的初學者及愛好者，提供唱腔、身段及擊樂的實作課程。

about.en: Community
Talks, demonstrations and cultural exchanges that connect the heritage with new generations in the UK.
about.zh: 透過講座、示範及文化交流，把這份傳統承傳予英國的新世代。

about.en: Showcase 2025 — our first full production on a London stage.
about.zh: 《粵韻飄香揚英倫 2025》 —— 我們在倫敦舞台的首場大型演出。

about.en: In September 2025 we presented our inaugural showcase at the Shaw Theatre in London: a thirteen-segment programme of classic Cantonese opera excerpts and music, performed by visiting and UK-based artists.
about.zh: 2025 年九月，我們於倫敦邵氏劇院呈獻首場演出：十三個經典粵劇選段及粵樂節目，由訪英及在英藝術家共同演出。

Be part of the next performance
Whether you'd like to perform, learn, volunteer or support — we'd love to hear from you.
about.zh: 無論您希望演出、學習、做義工或支持我們，都歡迎與我們聯絡。
